title: Project Cheirosiphon
description: Project Cheirosiphon is a datapack that aims to give copper a use
body:
Project Cheirosiphon is a Datapack which adds various items that give copper some use other than being for building and a decoration block

it currently adds 
-The Heart of Ichor

![the recipe for ichor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6f0f3dc3e1a18e2f902863afeb29fbaa8747d1c.png)

which is a crafting material that will be used in most of our recipes

-The AnchorBlade

![anchorblade recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62ff26235543de492d26cd50f4a4bc5efd66f66d.png)

A strong early game copper weapon that has strong knockback and slows you down while holding it in your mainhand

-The Thalassa

![thalassa recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1becaf0ef1e283a3ae27c8316c5d896d8d3ed0a4.png)

A movement based upgrade for the trident that gives you speed when held and grants you the ability to dash (Put in empty offhand to dash)

-Talos' Fist
  
![fist recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff650de78b9e3a075d009ed451c41907fb4c697e.png)

A very strong high damaging fist weapon that does medium knockback and summons lightning
(put in empty offhand to summon lighting)

-Orichalcum Ingot

![Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86921e92c348f7387c3371e53e8d9de22e8b1e4.png)

A crafting item which is a netherite ingot made of copper instead of gold

- Orichalcum Helmet
  
![Ori Helm recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b7c7672d5f73cdcd67ead073b9ff462dd0b14d7.png)

A helmet that grants you speed waxed copper blocks(not cut copper or stairs) and strenth after looking at a lightning rod (Put in empty offhand with nothing on your head to equip)

(have an empty offhand when using items abilities because it will delete the offhand item if not)
